title: User Portfolio & Preferences (Portfolio Optimization Start)
outcome: Portfolio positions (tickers, allocation, sector/industry, metrics, reasoning) recorded for full reproducibility. User preferences—age 25, $5M net worth, high risk tolerance, preference for lower beta/pairwise correlation, higher risk-adjusted returns and alpha documented.

title: Optimized Portfolio Proposal - Structure & Changes
outcome: Rebalanced and optimized new portfolio. Weak/correlated/scenario-vulnerable tickers (DGNX, ARM, OKLO, CRDO, FUFU, REIT cluster etc.) removed. Added higher-quality, lower-beta, better scenario resilience names: MRK, QCOM, IDXX, AIZ, SO, CHKP, ABBV, WMT, GS; upweighted PLTR, BSX. See working memory for allocations & detailed change log.
